dialogueChunks.intro: It is done, {player_name}. {quest_focus_The} {quest_focus_is} mine, and things will be better for it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The council recognized my claim this morning. {target_npc} conceded after they saw the evidence and the support we had gathered. The {enemy_type} threat is being addressed, supply lines are open, and decisions are being made instead of debated endlessly.
dialogueChunks.outro: You helped me earn this. Not just take it: earn it. Here is what I promised, and know that you will always have an ally in power.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I will not pretend the victory was clean. But it is mine.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The opposition crumbled after you dealt with their enforcers. {target_npc} left rather than face the assembly. Some call me ruthless, and maybe they are right. But the defenses are strengthened and the {enemy_type_plural} have not breached our perimeter since I took charge. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} secure.
dialogueChunks.outro: History remembers results, not methods. Here is your share of the results.

dialogueChunks.intro: I pushed too far, {player_name}. I know that now.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I got what I wanted: {quest_focus_the}, the authority, the control. And it lasted three days before {target_npc} rallied enough support to force a shared council. I am still at the table, but I am not the only voice anymore. Part of me is furious. Another part is relieved. Leading alone was exhausting in ways I did not expect.
dialogueChunks.outro: I learned something about ambition: having it is not the sin. Letting it consume you is. Take this, and know I am grateful for your honesty.

dialogueChunks.intro: The dust has settled, {player_name}. {quest_focus_The} is secure, the {enemy_type_plural} are gone, and the settlement is moving forward under new leadership.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} challenged my appointment publicly, and I welcomed the debate. In the end, the people chose action over promises. {quest_ally} says morale is higher than it has been in years. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} in capable hands now.
dialogueChunks.outro: Power earned through deeds is power that lasts. You helped me prove that.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I sit where I always wanted to sit. And the view from here is more complicated than I imagined.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {enemy_type_plural} are dealt with. {quest_focus_The} is productive again. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} growing. But {target_npc} still has supporters who watch my every move, waiting for a mistake. Good. It keeps me honest.
dialogueChunks.outro: Ambition got me here. Wisdom will keep me here. Thank you for being the blade that cut through the obstacles.
